testcase.name: testRegression_InicioSimulacion
testcase.system-out:
14:53:26.568 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - === INICIANDO SIMULACION === 14:53:26.568 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - Horario: 08:00 - 9:00 (1 horas) 14:53:26.571 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - testcase.name: testRegression_SimulacionCompleta
